--- sales_orders.sql ---
{{ config(
    materialized='view'
) }}

WITH base AS (
    SELECT
    *
    FROM {{ source('raw_data', 'orders') }}
),

customers AS (
    SELECT
    *
    FROM {{ ref('customers') }}
)

SELECT
    base.order_id AS order_id,
    base.amount AS amount
FROM base
LEFT JOIN customers
  ON base.customer_id = customers.customer_id

--- sales_orders_schema.yml ---
version: 2

models:
  - name: sales_orders
    description: "Sales orders view"
    columns:
      - name: order_id
        description: "The primary key of the order"
        tests:
          - unique
          - not_null
      - name: amount
